Layout reference

Department header, navigation and footer

This page brings the current department layout components into a plain HTML reference so teams can review the structure, spacing and content without running an application.

The raw source templates and SCSS are stored under src/_layout. The compiled preview stylesheet is served from dist/assets/layout-reference.css.

View sample content

Sample body

Sample department content

Body content can sit between the shared header, navigation and footer while retaining the department layout rhythm.

Services

Help people find education services, school information and support pathways across Queensland.

Resources

Provide clear access to policies, forms, publications and contact information.

News

Share updates, announcements and stories in a consistent department experience.

This is placeholder content for layout review only. Replace links and examples with project-specific content when using the components in a product.

Content patterns

Example section

Teams can use this page to check common page elements against the shared header, menu and footer.

  • Confirm the header brand area scales cleanly on small screens.
  • Check dropdown menu behaviour on desktop and stacked navigation on mobile.
  • Review footer links, social channels, acknowledgement text and contact call-to-action.

Department of Education

The Department of Education acknowledges the Traditional Owners of the lands, seas, skies and waterways from across Queensland. We pay our respects to the Elders past, present and emerging, for they hold the memories, the traditions, the culture and hopes of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples across the state.
